asset_resolution_context.context_label: Curated identity context only. A resolved name does not change a disclosure's review or production status, and an unresolved name is not evidence of misconduct.

methodology.matching: Exact curated aliases after conservative punctuation, ownership-note, and disclosure-suffix normalization; otherwise one explicit known symbol token.
methodology.ticker_guard: A disclosed ticker is not accepted unless it appears as a standalone token and belongs to the curated reference table.
methodology.unresolved_policy: Ambiguous or unsupported names remain unresolved.

disclaimer: This public research preview combines source-backed official rosters, official House Clerk, Senate, and OGE parser previews, and market context. Development fixtures are excluded from public timelines. Parser previews require review and are not reviewed public-production trades.

completeness_dashboard.context_label: Completeness dashboard tracks source-backed role scope, queued source searches, raw archived documents, and reviewed public trade rows by branch, term, and source.

ingestion_queue.context_label: Branch-aware queue for raw disclosure retrieval and review. Queue rows are not trade records; public trade rows require raw document archive, parser output, and reviewer promotion.

blocked_rows.blocked_reason: reviewed fixture or non-production source; real public trade promotion requires official raw document review

production_promotions.context_label: Production trade promotion gate. Rows appear only after official raw documents are archived, parsed, reviewed, and explicitly marked public production.

raw_archive_index.context_label: Raw disclosure artifacts are archived with hashes before parser output or public trade rows. Pending rows require official-source retrieval and review.

documents.notes: Official OGE sample form used for parser regression and raw-document archive plumbing; not a production official filing.
Historical presidential disclosures may require OGE collection search, archive review, or request workflow before raw documents can be promoted into parser review.
Search and archive official OGE collection results before normalized presidential rows are reviewed.
Search and archive official OGE collection results before normalized presidential rows are reviewed.
Current-term disclosures require scheduled OGE collection review and reviewer promotion before becoming production trade rows.

batches.instruction: Use House Clerk disclosure search for the named member and current Congress, then archive raw PDF before parsing.
batches.rights_note: The House search page states statutory restrictions on use of financial disclosure information and notes redaction of certain personally identifiable information. CivicLedger must preserve this notice before ingesting or exporting records.

batches.instruction: After source terms are acknowledged, search the Senate public disclosure system for the named senator and archive raw reports before parsing.
batches.rights_note: The Senate public disclosure page identifies the Senate Public Financial Disclosure Database as the public search entry point and describes STOCK Act transaction reporting for Senators and senior staff.

batches.instruction: Search OGE individual disclosures by official name; archive released 278e or 278-T files before parser review.
batches.rights_note: OGE displays statutory restrictions on obtaining or using public financial disclosure reports, including restrictions on unlawful, commercial, credit-rating, and solicitation uses. CivicLedger must preserve this notice before ingestion, export, or share-card use.

batches.instruction: After judiciary access terms are acknowledged, request/search JEFS records by judge name and court before parser review.
batches.rights_note: The judicial database requires requester information and acknowledgement of statutory access and use restrictions. CivicLedger must not automate around those access requirements.

retrieval_batches.context_label: First-pass retrieval batches select real source-backed officials from the disclosure queue. They do not bypass official access acknowledgements and do not create public trade rows.

reviewed_promotions.context_label: Promotion workflow proof using parser fixtures. These rows verify review mechanics and are not public production official trade records.

promotions.confidence_label: Reviewed fixture promotion; not a public production official trade

alerts.message: Current official/current-term queue has no archived raw disclosure documents yet.
Current official/current-term queue has no archived raw disclosure documents yet.
Current source lane has at least one archived raw disclosure document.
Current official/current-term queue has no archived raw disclosure documents yet.
No reviewed public production trade rows exist yet; keep public UI labeled as demo/source-status.
Public official roster generated 0 day(s) ago.

source_staleness_alerts.context_label: Scheduled stale-source alerts for current officials and live source lanes. Warnings identify work queues; they are not allegations or trade findings.

federal_event_context.context_label: Official-source public laws, executive orders, and Supreme Court opinions selected by a disclosed market-topic title and official-summary taxonomy. Selection indicates possible context, not a relationship to any trade.

scope.selection_method: Market-relevant title and official-summary keyword taxonomy v1

historical_news_context.context_label: News discovery context only. A provider match is not verification of an article's claims and does not imply causation, intent, legality, ethics, or investment performance.

scope.document_scope: Member periodic transaction reports indexed by the House Clerk

source.name: Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives

transactions_manifest.context_label: Official House Clerk PTR parser previews. Every row remains review-gated and is not a reviewed public-production trade. Image-only filings are reported as OCR required.

source.name: Office of the Clerk, U.S. House of Representatives

market_reaction_context.context_label: Descriptive price context only. Windows are anchored to the first common market date on or after the reported trade date. Date proximity and benchmark-adjusted arithmetic do not establish causation, intent, knowledge, legality, ethics, market impact, or investment performance.

methodology.anchor: First common asset and benchmark market date on or after trade_date.
methodology.coverage_policy: Rows require a direct asset series, an explicit benchmark mapping, and at least one complete pre or post window.
methodology.post_window: Return from the anchor to N common trading sessions after the anchor.
methodology.pre_window: Return from N common trading sessions before the anchor to the anchor.
methodology.price_field: Adjusted close when present; otherwise close.
methodology.trade_action_treatment: BUY, SELL, and EXCHANGE labels are retained but do not change the sign of returns.

official_event_involvement.context_label: Direct legislative involvement is limited to official sponsor, cosponsor, and specific roll-call records. All other links are labeled institutional or temporal context and do not imply individual knowledge, intent, wrongdoing, or a relationship to any financial transaction.

methodology.context_limit: Presidential entries are temporal officeholder context; agency links are topic-routing context; court links are institution-and-docket context. None establishes individual awareness, knowledge, intent, or participation beyond an expressly cited official record.
methodology.offline_determinism: Canonical URLs exclude API credentials. Cached response bodies, retrieval timestamps, and hashes are reused verbatim; output ordering and generated_at are derived only from source snapshots.

cosponsor.record_scope: Congress.gov bill cosponsorship period, including withdrawal and readdition history.

recorded_vote.record_scope: Position recorded on the specific roll-call question; not by itself a final-law position.

methodology.vote_scope: Each vote preserves the specific official roll-call question. A procedural or amendment vote is not reclassified as support for or opposition to the final law.

presidential_oge_documents.context_label: Curated official OGE presidential disclosure documents. Parsed transaction rows are previews and require review before public production promotion.

presidential_oge_status.context_label: Presidential OGE disclosure status records identify source readiness only. They are not trade records and do not imply any transaction activity.

sec_filing_context.context_label: Official filing-presence context only. Inclusion does not establish the materiality of a filing to a trade and does not imply causation, intent, legality, ethics, or investment performance.

scope.document_scope: Senator and former-Senator periodic transaction reports

source.name: Secretary of the U.S. Senate, Office of Public Records
source.online_availability_note: The official portal covers reports filed from 2012 onward and applies retention limits; roster coverage does not imply that every historical report remains online.

transactions.context_label: Official Senate eFD parser previews. Every structured row remains review-gated and is not a reviewed public-production trade. Paper-image reports remain unparsed pending OCR and human review.

source.name: Secretary of the U.S. Senate, Office of Public Records

sources.name: House Financial Disclosure Reports
provenance_requirements: Persist the source URL used for the search or download.
Archive the raw document or index payload before parsing.
Record retrieval timestamp, retrieval source, file hash, parser version, and dataset version.
Mark records as fixture/demo until an official-source ingestion run completes.

readiness.label: Official index and parser previews ready
missing_capabilities: OCR extraction and validation for image-only filings

sources.records_scope: Member, staff, and candidate financial disclosure reports published by the Office of the Clerk.
sources.rights_note: The House search page states statutory restrictions on use of financial disclosure information and notes redaction of certain personally identifiable information. CivicLedger must preserve this notice before ingesting or exporting records.

sources.name: Senate Public Financial Disclosure Database
provenance_requirements: Persist the official disclosure database URL used for retrieval.
Store raw response or document artifacts before normalized rows are created.
Record retrieval timestamp, retrieval source, file hash, parser version, and dataset version.
Keep chamber-specific parsing separate until field mappings are verified.
sources.records_scope: Senate public financial disclosures and periodic transaction reports maintained through public disclosure systems.
sources.rights_note: The Senate public disclosure page identifies the Senate Public Financial Disclosure Database as the public search entry point and describes STOCK Act transaction reporting for Senators and senior staff.

sources.name: OGE Officials' Individual Disclosures
provenance_requirements: Persist the OGE collection URL or request workflow used for access.
Archive any released PDF, spreadsheet, or request response before parsing.
Record filer office, agency, document type, retrieval timestamp, file hash, parser version, and dataset version.
Keep executive branch parser mappings separate from legislative mappings.
sources.records_scope: Executive branch public financial disclosure documents, including OGE Form 278e annual reports and OGE Form 278-T periodic transaction reports where available.
sources.rights_note: OGE displays statutory restrictions on obtaining or using public financial disclosure reports, including restrictions on unlawful, commercial, credit-rating, and solicitation uses. CivicLedger must preserve this notice before ingestion, export, or share-card use.

sources.name: Federal Judicial Financial Disclosure Reports
provenance_requirements: Persist the judiciary disclosure database URL or request workflow used for access.
Archive released reports before normalized records are created.
Record court, judge type, report type, retrieval timestamp, file hash, parser version, and dataset version.
Keep judicial parser mappings separate from legislative and executive mappings.
sources.records_scope: Financial disclosure reports and periodic transaction reports for federal judges and covered judiciary personnel released through the Administrative Office of the U.S. Courts.
sources.rights_note: The judicial database requires requester information and acknowledgement of statutory access and use restrictions. CivicLedger must not automate around those access requirements.
